result.stdout:
Usage: migrate [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.
  -v|--verbose           Show verbose output
  --version              Show the current version of the tool
  -s|--sagadataname      The saga data class name (w/o namespace) of the saga
                         data to export. This will be the table name.
  -c|--connectionstring  The connection string to the Azure Storage account with
                         the saga data.
  -i|--ignore-updates    Ignore tool updates.

commands.payload:
Usage: migrate [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.
  -v|--verbose           Show verbose output
  --version              Show the current version of the tool

                         data to export. This will be the table name.
  -c|--connectionstring  The connection string to the Azure Storage account with
                         the saga data.
  -i|--ignore-updates    Ignore tool updates.
